sources: Support quest items added (bulwark-of-the-mountain, black-mist-scythe), both 500g completed upgrades (Relic Shield / Spectral Sickle lines) — WildRiftFire 7.2 guides recommend them in 13 / 12 champion builds. Stats (V5.3): Bulwark 175 health + 10 ability haste; Black Mist Scythe 10 ability haste + Versatile 14 AD / 28 AP (Adaptive). Shared passives: Spoils of War / Tribute (2 gold per 3s + anti-ward bonus damage), Spellcraft (champion takedown -> -40% active-item cooldown), Quest (Limited to 1 Quest item). Quest/adaptive/gold mechanics are descriptive text only — the stat engine models just the flat stats (Bulwark maxHealth+abilityHaste; Black Mist Scythe abilityHaste). Brand-new entities, so no provenance stamps per the add-entity rule.

Verification note for the two support items: this remote session's egress gateway denies wiki.leagueoflegends.com, the Fandom mirror, wildriftfire, lolwildriftbuild, riftgg, wr-meta AND archive.org (403 on CONNECT), so the wiki pages above could not be fetched directly here — values were cross-checked via Anthropic-side WebSearch of those same pages. Two summary-level conflicts were resolved by triangulating base vs. upgrade: Relic Shield (100 health) -> Bulwark 175 health (the '200 health' listing belongs to the removed Targon's Buckler path); Spectral Sickle (6 AD/12 AP) -> Black Mist Scythe 14/28 (the '20/40' figure did not reconcile). A recurring 'Soulforce, 75 gold/60s, adaptive stacks' description was rejected as PC-League contamination (a same-named PC item), not the WR mechanic. Re-confirm the two flagged values against the official WR wiki from an unrestricted network before flipping verified.
Seeded from data/patches/7.1 (7.1g); unstamped values carry over unchanged and remain accurate as of 7.1g verification.

verified: false — the official WR wiki had not published 7.2 item/champion numbers as of this update (Yunara's own wiki page was an unpopulated stub; new/reworked item pages 404'd). Values are sourced from official Riot patch notes cross-checked against wildriftfire/wr-meta. Re-verify against the official wiki once it catches up. See ROSTER.md "Patch 7.2" section for exactly what's pending, including one unresolved discrepancy (Yunara's base attack speed: wildriftfire says 0.77, wr-meta says 0.75 — wr-meta used).
